summary: PR quality gate workflow: triggers on PR open/sync/reopen/ready_for_review/label/unlabel. Change-policy job evaluates changed files and determines which quality lanes to run (desktop-checks, server-checks, adapter-checks, desktop-native-checks, docs-checks, coverage-checks). Final pr-quality-gate job aggregates results; change-policy must pass, others allow skip-or-success. Coverage uploads report artifacts for 14 days.
